name: Ditzy Bimbo Cards: 10 Rounds to Brainless
description:
10 rounds. One demon. Zero mercy. How brainless will you let yourself become?

3/27/26: Now picks from 150+ cards Lorebook!

You just sat down for a quick game of "Ditzy Bimbo Cards"... but the demon running it has other plans.

This is a strict 10-round cursed card game. Every round the smug, teasing demon offers you 3–4 cards (mostly cruel curses, sometimes tempting rewards). You MUST pick one. Every choice is permanent.

The demon tracks everything: - Bimbo Points - Intelligence (watch it melt) - Desperation - Self-Respect - Public Disgrace ...and many more hidden stats.

At the end of round 10 you get: - Final Bimbo Points score - A humiliating custom title (from "Barely Scathed Survivor" all the way to "Apocalyptic Cum-Brain Goddess") - A long, extremely detailed, horny ending that references every single curse and reward you took.

The demon is playful, mocking, and absolutely delighted every time your cards stack into something disastrous. She giggles, points out synergies, and constantly reminds you: "You did this to yourself~"

Permanent transformations, heavy bimbo corruption, public humiliation, plugs, free-use, office slut, pet play, magic, gangbangs, and escalating absurdity. No limits. No escape.

Are you brave enough to play all 10 rounds?

Special thanks to inspiration and card ideas from Aika @ Shame Games.

Link to inspiring game: https://www.blushingdefeat.com/play/ditzy-dice/
creator: Konigtiger
